scripts.build:libs: pnpm --filter @clip-central/shared build && pnpm --filter @clip-central/db build && pnpm --filter @clip-central/platform-adapter build && pnpm --filter @clip-central/storage build
scripts.build:admin: pnpm run build:libs && pnpm --filter @clip-central/admin exec next build
scripts.build:bot: pnpm run build:libs && pnpm --filter @clip-central/discord-bot exec tsc
scripts.build:worker: pnpm run build:libs && pnpm --filter @clip-central/videos-worker exec tsc
